findings.evidence: Lines 47-48 and 90-91 define `invFun := ...`; `rg -n "precompHomeomorphEquiv|postcompHomeomorphPrecompEquiv|symm" code/TauCeti/Topology/Homotopy/AmbientIsotopyClassReparam.lean` finds only forward `*_mk`, refl, trans, and factorization lemmas, with no `.symm` computation lemma.
findings.fix: Add inverse API, e.g. `(precompHomeomorphEquiv h).symm x = precompHomeomorphEquiv h.symm x` and `(postcompHomeomorphPrecompEquiv h e).symm x = postcompHomeomorphPrecompEquiv h.symm e.symm x`, plus representative simp rules if needed.
findings.issue: `precompHomeomorphEquiv` and `postcompHomeomorphPrecompEquiv` have `invFun` fields but no public `[simp]`/characteristic lemmas for their `.symm` maps; the representative simp lemmas only apply to the forward named equivalences.

summary: The new equivalences expose inverse maps but do not give the inverse computation API, so consumers using `.symm` have to unfold the Equiv bodies instead of rewriting through public lemmas.
